Regulation Summary

By right (§17.5.1, LP p.202): Central Commercial (KEP), Peripheral Commercial, Activity Axes I/II/IV
Conditional (§17.5.4, LP p.204): Axis III, KG zones — specialty clinic max 15 beds
Conditional (§17.5.2, LP p.203): Ka zones along primary roads — min 1,000 m², coverage ≤0.35:1, parking +30%
Not permitted: Agricultural, Protection, Tourist, Industrial zones
